items.title: AI, ML, DL, and Gen AI nesting
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  ai["Artificial Intelligence"]
  ml["Machine Learning"]
  dl["Deep Learning"]
  genai["Generative AI"]
  ai --> ml
  ml --> dl
  dl --> genai
items.caption: Deep learning is a subset of machine learning; modern generative AI is largely built on deep learning methods.

items.title: Representation learning pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["raw input
(image, text, audio)"] --> layer1["layer 1
simple patterns"]
  layer1 --> layer2["layer 2
combinations"]
  layer2 --> layer3["layer 3
task concepts"]
  layer3 --> output["task output
class, score, token"]
items.caption: Each layer transforms the previous representation; training adjusts all layers jointly.

items.title: Classical ML vs deep learning features
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  cdata["data"] --> cfeat["hand-crafted features"]
  cfeat --> cmodel["classical model"]
  ddata["data"] --> dnet["multi-layer network"]
  dnet --> dmodel["task head"]
items.caption: Left path: engineer features then fit a classical model. Right path: the deep network learns representations and the task head jointly.
